name: open-search
description: Open source MCP search server for Claude Code. Replaces WebSearch + WebFetch with a single tool call returning verbatim, query-relevant excerpts.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web and return extracted content optimized for LLM consumption. Returns structured results with title, URL, relevance score, and clean markdown content extracted from each page.

include_domains.description: Only include results from these domains

time_range.description: Filter by time: day, week, month, year

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract clean markdown content from specific URLs. Fetches pages, strips boilerplate, and returns main content. Direct replacement for WebFetch without AI summarization.

urls.description: URL or list of URLs to extract (max 10)

query.description: Optional query to score content by relevance
